creator: dchapes@ddm.crosswinds.net
text:
The doxygen port is at version 1.2.4 and it does not install any
of the documentation included documentation.

The attached patch upgrades the port to 1.2.6 (just changing PORTVERSION
and updating distinfo) and builds and installs the included HTML
documentation to share/doc/doxygen/html (unless NOPORTDOCS is set).

Also, if HAVE_LATEX is defined it will also build the DVI and PostScript
format of the documenation and install those files in share/doc/doxygen
(again, unless NOPORTDOCS is set).

If the committer doesn't like my invention of HAVE_LATEX feel free to
omit the two ifdef HAVE_LATEX blocks from the makefile and the two
associated lines in the plist before commiting.
